title: assessment.invited payload (v1)
description: Emitted when an assessment invite is created and the candidate should be emailed a take link. TWO producers publish this same subject: the native invite route (apps/assessment-service/src/routes/invites.ts) and the vendor provider-invite worker (apps/assessment-service/src/workers/provider-invite.worker.ts). The vendor path additionally carries `provider` + `providerInvitationId`; those are marked optional here since the native path omits them.
x-producer: assessment-service (native invite route + vendor provider-invite worker)

email.description: Candidate email the link goes to.

rawTokenUrl.description: Absolute take URL. Native: {APP_URL}/assessment/take/{rawToken}. Vendor: the vendor candidateTestUrl, else the native invite fallback.

provider.description: Vendor path only: assessment provider key (e.g. hackerrank, codesignal). Absent on the native path.

providerInvitationId.description: Vendor path only: the vendor's invitation id. Absent on the native path.
